findings.title: Zero test coverage for derivePluginName()
findings.issue: derivePluginName() has no unit tests. tasks.md specifies 7 test cases (plugin path, short path, no-plugins segment, root SKILL.md, null, undefined, backslashes). None exist in slug.test.ts.
findings.suggestion: Add the 7 test cases from T-001 test plan to slug.test.ts.
findings.impact: Regressions to plugin name derivation would go undetected. Function is used in publish, backfill, and display paths.

findings.title: Zero test coverage for publishSkill pluginName wiring
findings.issue: publishSkill() pluginName behavior has no dedicated tests. Tasks.md specifies 3 test cases (plugin path sets pluginName, non-plugin path sets null, re-publish updates pluginName).
findings.suggestion: Add tests verifying upsert create/update branches include correct pluginName values.
findings.impact: Silent regression if publishSkill upsert is refactored.

findings.title: Zero test coverage for CLI find pluginName display
findings.issue: find.ts pluginName display has no tests. Tasks.md specifies 4 test cases (TTY with/without pluginName, piped with/without pluginName).
findings.suggestion: Add TTY and piped mode tests asserting plugin badge [pluginName] appears/absent.
findings.impact: Display regressions in CLI output would go unnoticed.

findings.title: Backfill cannot clear incorrect pluginName values
findings.issue: Conditional spread `...(change.pluginName !== null ? { pluginName: change.pluginName } : {})` means null pluginName is never written. If a skill moves out of a plugins/ dir, backfill won't clear the stale pluginName. AC-US3-03 says non-plugin paths should get pluginName=null.
findings.suggestion: Always set pluginName in the update data: `pluginName: change.pluginName` (drop conditional spread).
findings.impact: Low in practice — skills rarely move out of plugin dirs, and pluginName is only set by system code.

findings.title: derivePluginName() lowercases output vs spec 'raw folder name'
findings.issue: .toLowerCase() applied to plugin folder name. Spec says 'raw folder name only' and 'does NOT prettify the folder name'. All existing plugin folders are already lowercase so this is a no-op in practice.
findings.suggestion: Either remove .toLowerCase() to match spec literally, or document intentional normalization in the function's JSDoc.
findings.impact: Minimal — all plugin folders are lowercase by convention.

notes: Implementation is complete across all 6 tasks (slug.ts, submission-store.ts, backfill-slugs/route.ts, SearchPalette.tsx, skills/page.tsx, skill detail page.tsx, CLI find.ts). Tasks/ACs in tasks.md and spec.md were not marked as completed. The main gap is zero test coverage for new code — all 3 high findings are test-related. No blockers or critical issues.
